untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe alignment analysis ('Price action aligns across multiple time frames') which cannot be expressed with single-timeframe indicators. Also, 'Move appears in the direction you are planning to enter' and 'Price breakout begins with huge volume' require context-dependent directional logic not fully expressible in the structured format. The 50% counter-trend retracement limit is approximated using returns scale but exact trend quality assessment is not available.
translation_notes: Interpreted 'volume above average' as volume > vol_ratio_20. Used ADX_14 > 25 as proxy for trend strength and follow-through likelihood. Counter-trend exit at -50%/+50% returns approximates the 50% retracement limit. Direction kept CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification. Multi-timeframe confirmation and directional context cannot be fully captured in this structure.
